creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to kunda from comment #0)

graphics/gdal updated to 3.0.3 in bug #243328.

(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #2)
(In reply to Loïc Bartoletti from comment #3)

I don't think it works.
databases/grass7 depends on graphics/gdal via LIB_DEPENDS. Adding GRASS option will make a circular dependency.
I'd like to close this PR since the version update is finished.
